overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V style) showing a character in a brown leather jacket walking through rainy city streets at night. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes by parked cars, street lights, and urban infrastructure with wet pavement reflections visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked cars and apartment buildings

events.description: red sedan drives past on the wet street from left to right
yellow taxi cab drives down the street in the background

agents.ego_description: character in brown leather jacket walks steadily along the wet sidewalk next to the street

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past on the wet asphalt street
yellow taxi driving down the street with headlights on

entered.detail: multi-story brick apartment building with illuminated windows
tall metal pole with overhead street lamp casting light on wet pavement
tall modern building with many lit windows visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet residential sidewalk at night during heavy rain. Street lights illuminate the scene, reflecting off the wet pavement. A red sedan and yellow taxi pass by on the street while the character moves past brick apartment buildings.

events.description: character steps off the curb and begins crossing the street
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: character crosses the wet street at the intersection, moving from the sidewalk into the crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the intersection for the light to change

entered.detail: white painted pole with horizontal traffic signal arm showing red then green light
illuminated store sign visible in the distance indicating commercial area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a street intersection. The traffic light changes from red to green as the character moves through the crosswalk. A white sedan waits at the light, and a Binco store sign becomes visible in the distance, indicating a transition toward a commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk next to park with metal fencing

events.description: moves from open intersection to tree-covered sidewalk with cobblestone pavement
silver pickup truck drives past on the adjacent street with headlights illuminating the rain

agents.ego_description: character walks along a cobblestone path under a canopy of trees, with a black metal fence running along the right side

notable_agents.action: silver pickup truck driving along the street with bright headlights in the rain

entered.detail: wrought iron fence running parallel to the sidewalk separating the path from a park area
large leafy trees forming a dense canopy overhead, partially blocking the sky
row of colorful newspaper boxes including red, yellow, and blue vending machines

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to a tree-lined sidewalk with cobblestone pavement, walking under a canopy of leaves next to a black metal fence. Colorful newspaper vending machines appear along the path. A silver pickup truck drives past on the adjacent street, its headlights cutting through the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corner with newspaper stands and approaching intersection

events.description: police cruiser drives past on the left side of the street with headlights on

agents.ego_description: character continues along the sidewalk past newspaper stands, approaching a corner store with illuminated interior

notable_agents.action: police cruiser driving down the street with headlights reflecting off the wet pavement

entered.detail: low commercial building with illuminated interior and signage visible at the street corner ahead
metal pole with traffic signs attached near the corner intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the newspaper stands and approaches a commercial corner with a lit storefront. A police cruiser drives by on the wet street. The environment transitions from the park-adjacent path to a more commercial street corner with signage and an upcoming intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy city at night, transitioning from a quiet residential neighborhood into a bustling commercial district. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk past brick apartment buildings, where street lights reflect off the pavement as a red sedan and yellow taxi pass by. As the character approaches and crosses a street intersection under a changing traffic light, the scene shifts toward a commercial area marked by a distant Binco store sign. The path then opens onto a tree-lined cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a black metal fence and colorful newspaper vending machines, while a silver pickup truck drives past with headlights cutting through the rain. Finally, the camera follows the character past the newspaper stands toward a lit storefront and a commercial corner as a police cruiser glides across the wet street.
